name: copilot-plugin-cc
description: GitHub Copilot CLI inside Claude Code. Eight slash commands for code review and cloud-agent delegation.

plugins.name: copilot
plugins.description: GitHub Copilot CLI as Claude Code slash commands. Includes /copilot:review, /copilot:adversarial-review, /copilot:rubber-duck, /copilot:rescue, /copilot:status, /copilot:result, /copilot:cancel, /copilot:setup. Pro and Pro+ aware model alias resolver with graceful fallback chains.
